projectDescription: A local-first worldbuilding desktop app for writers and DM-style planners, combining entity management, interactive maps, timelines, linguistics, and rich-text writing into a single offline-first workspace.
keyFeatures: Local-first SQLite WASM storage via OPFS — zero cloud dependency
World Bible: hierarchical entity library with folder management and rich-text editor (Tiptap)
Dynamic entity archetypes with custom attribute templates (EAV model)
Interactive map editor with custom image upload, MapLibre/Deck.gl layers, and drawing tools
Timeline & Chronos: multi-track event editor with calendar support
Glyph Foundry: conlang/linguistics engine with custom glyph drawing and .ttf font compilation
Relationship graph visualization with node inspection
Rich-text notebook (Writing Hub) with mention auto-linking and slash commands
Export to DOCX/ZIP with world bible compilation via Java auxiliary backend
Dark/light theme system with dynamic CSS variables
Feature-Sliced Architecture (vertical slices) with automated architecture guardrails
publicApiSurface: GET /db/export/{projectName} — export project as ZIP (db + map assets)
POST /db/import/async/{projectName} — async import with job tracking
GET /db/import/status/{jobId} — poll async import job status
GET /db/import/result/{jobId} — retrieve result of async import
POST /sync/payload/{projectName} — archive a JSON sync payload
POST /mapeditor/assets/{projectName}/upload-url — upload map image from URL
POST /worldbible/export/{projectName}?format= — compile and export world bible (DOCX/PDF/HTML)
POST /linguistics/font/compile — compile custom conlang glyphs into a .ttf font
